creator: corsmith@gmail.com
text:
Please consider adding "device carp" to the GENERIC kernel.  We have many servers using carp and it increases the complexity of installs and (binary) upgrades when you have to build a custom kernel only for this functionality.  The kernel size increase is small and the benefits are (IMHO) worthwhile.

Fix: 

Please consider adding "device carp" to the GENERIC kernel.
How-To-Repeat: device carp is not in the GENERIC kernel and it is very difficult to make a module to add this support via kld
